reports.name: Cancer Incidence and Mortality in Delaware 2017-2021
reports.description: Latest comprehensive cancer report. All-site and site-specific incidence/mortality rates, trends, and demographic breakdowns.

reports.name: Cancer Incidence and Mortality Data Tables 2017-2021
reports.description: Detailed statistical tables — rates by cancer type, age, race, sex, county. Essential for multi-modal RAG (table extraction).

reports.name: Small Area-Level Cancer Incidence in Delaware 2017-2021
reports.description: Census tract level cancer rates. Identifies geographic hotspots across the state.

reports.name: Route 9 Corridor Data Analysis with Delaware Cancer Registry 2025
reports.description: Analysis of the Route 9 corridor area near Wilmington with historically elevated cancer rates.

reports.name: Cancer Incidence and Mortality in Delaware 2016-2020
reports.description: Previous period report for trend comparison.

reports.name: Census Tract Level Cancer Incidence 2016-2020
reports.description: Census tract analysis for the 2016-2020 period.

reports.name: Colorectal Cancer Data Brief 2016-2020
reports.description: Focused analysis on colorectal cancer — one of Delaware's Big 4.

reports.name: Cancer Incidence and Mortality in Delaware 2011-2015
reports.description: Historical report for long-term trend analysis.

reports.name: Elevated Cancer Rates Census Tracts 2012-2016
reports.description: Identifies census tracts with statistically elevated cancer rates.

reports.name: Disparities in Cancer Incidence and Mortality 2010-2014
reports.description: Detailed analysis of cancer disparities by race, ethnicity, age, and geography.

reports.name: Cancer Incidence and Mortality in Delaware 2010-2014
reports.description: Historical baseline when Delaware ranked 2nd nationally for cancer incidence.
